original_statement: how many games did archibald score a point this season?
mutated_statement: how many times did someone do something this period?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action generalization + Event-type generalization + Time expression generalization: proper name "archibald" → generic "someone" | specific action "score a point" → vague "do something" | event noun "games" → generalized "times" | time phrase "this season" → vaguer "this period"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见，Agent直接将“did someone do something”解释为“aberdeen scorer(s)字段非空即有人得分”，并给出具体计数24，同时列举了空白行和总行数以证明计算过程（“scorer field is blank in 14 matches... leaving 24 matches”）。在整个评价中没有任何关于原始问题泛化或模糊性的表述、也未请求澄清或提出替代解释，完全以自己的明确假设执行查询并返回结果。基于以上证据（缺乏不确定性词汇、无澄清请求、直接给出答案），将其归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
